title: triticum repens var. violaceum
intro: Triticum repens var. violaceum, also known as purple false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Triticum repens var. violaceum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
